Lyrics:

Maula, Maula
Meri har baat mein
Teri hi baat hai
Sab se hi A‘la teri Zaat hai
Mere Nabi

Salla Allah ‘ala sayyidna Muhammad 
Salla Allahu ‘alayhi wa sallam
Salla Allah ‘ala sayyidna Muhammad 
Salla Allahu ‘alayhi wa sallam
Salla Allah ‘ala sayyidna Muhammad 
Salla Allahu ‘alayhi wa sallam
Salla Allah ‘ala sayyidna Muhammad 
Salla Allahu ‘alayhi wa sallam

Mila hai sahara tere dar se hi
Dooba kinara tere dar pe hi
Maangun main tujh se, mera rakh le bharam
Ban ke sawali, aye yeh kar de karam
Puri kar de Maula meri arziyan sabhi

Salla Allah ‘ala sayyidna Muhammad 
Salla Allahu ‘alayhi wa sallam
Salla Allah ‘ala sayyidna Muhammad 
Salla Allahu ‘alayhi wa sallam
Salla Allah ‘ala sayyidna Muhammad 
Salla Allahu ‘alayhi wa sallam
Salla Allah ‘ala sayyidna Muhammad 
Salla Allahu ‘alayhi wa sallam

How many hearts you saved from the fire 
Like the rain in the desert sky 
Your words are arrows clear and true 
When I close my eyes at night 
I see a moon of golden light 
I freed my soul it followed you

Salla Allah ‘ala sayyidna Muhammad 
Salla Allahu ‘alayhi wa sallam
Salla Allah ‘ala sayyidna Muhammad 
Salla Allahu ‘alayhi wa sallam
Salla Allah ‘ala sayyidna Muhammad 
Salla Allahu ‘alayhi wa sallam
Salla Allah ‘ala sayyidna Muhammad 
Salla Allahu ‘alayhi wa sallam

Qur’an bhi Khuda ne teri shaan mein utara
Tera zikr hi rehmat hai
Ho jaaun main gadaa bas teri hi gali ka
Ab dil ki yeh hasrat hai

And when everyone forgets 
Oh ya Rasool Allah 
You’ll be the mercy and salvation
For my soul 

Salla Allah ‘ala sayyidna Muhammad 
Salla Allahu ‘alayhi wa sallam
Salla Allah ‘ala sayyidna Muhammad 
Salla Allahu ‘alayhi wa sallam
Salla Allah ‘ala sayyidna Muhammad 
Salla Allahu ‘alayhi wa sallam
Salla Allah ‘ala sayyidna Muhammad 
Salla Allahu ‘alayhi wa sallam

snippet.title: CG5 - Wrong Side Out (from Poppy Playtime: Chapter 5)
snippet.description:
STREAM NOW: https://cg5.lnk.to/wrongsideout

Song by @CG5
Guitars by Josh Locke

Animation & Production Team:

Kaylin Radomski (https://x.com/KaylinYGO)
Director, Storyboarding, Animator, Layout, Cleanup, and Lighting

Edil Ayazbayev ( @Mango5_)
Editor, Post-Production, Animator, Layout, and Cleanup

Chance J. ( https://x.com/TheOGFazFilms )
Animator, Layout, and Cleanup

Jaiden I. (@Hyplamic)
Animator and Layout

Nikolas R. (https://x.com/YTBluey_) 
Animator, Layout, Cleanup, and Rigging

Austin Faulk (https://x.com/AustinThe_Bear)
Technical Assistance and Rigging

Kyle DeNigris (@ItsameWario)
Trailer Sound Design and VA

Single artwork by @ShirotaniArt

All game assets provided by Mob Entertainment.

Follow CG5's social media:
Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats
Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music
Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_
Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/

Follow @cg5live105, @cg5instrumentals461, & @cg5covers107
Discord Server ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

LYRICS:

I made us a home,
From what was once a prison.
So if you share my vision,
Thank me, dear, for paradise.

And in the hour of joy,
Don’t bite the hand that feeds you, child.
Or do I have to fix you?
‘Cuz once I do, you’ll never die.

I can make you better,
I can make you right.
Maybe now, you’ll see reason from the wrong side out.

(A child’s what they, child’s what they, child’s what they made you.
A child’s what they, child’s what they, child’s what they made you.)

I gave us new life,
Through reanimation.
But you brought an outlier to my equation,
So shall we see what you look like?

I can make you better,
I can make you right.
Maybe now, you’ll see reason from the wrong side out.
I’ll stitch you together,
And you’ll get lost in the white.
Maybe now, you’ll feel freedom from the wrong side out.

(TELL ME WHO I AM! DON’T PUT ME IN THE BOX! I’LL BE GOOD I’LL BE GOOD!)
But a child’s what they made you.
(TELL ME WHO I AM! DON’T PUT ME IN THE BOX! I’LL BE GOOD I’LL BE GOOD!)
But a child’s what they made you.

You can’t burn down all that we are,
Or turn around,
This is the start of my immortal perfection.
And I’m your God.

I can make you better,
I can make you right.
Maybe now, you’ll see reason from the wrong side out.

I’ll stitch you together,
And you’ll get lost in the white.
Maybe now, you’ll feel freedom from the wrong side out.

(TELL ME WHO I AM! DON’T PUT ME IN THE BOX! I’LL BE GOOD I’LL BE GOOD!)
But a child’s what they made you.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Your Favorite Toy (Live on The Graham Norton Show)
snippet.description:
The first live performance of “Your Favorite Toy” from the forthcoming new album. Out April 24. Pre-order/pre-save now: https://foofighters.lnk.to/yourfavoritetoy 

Listen to “Your Favorite Toy”: https://foofighters.lnk.to/yft-single

See Foo Fighters live on tour: https://FooFighters.lnk.to/Shows

Subscribe to the official Foo Fighters YouTube channel: https://FooFighters.lnk.to/subscribeYD

Follow Foo Fighters:
Facebook: https://FooFighters.lnk.to/followFI
Instagram: https://FooFighters.lnk.to/followII
Tiktok: https://www.tiktok.com/@foofightersofficial
Twitter: https://FooFighters.lnk.to/followTI
Website: https://FooFighters.lnk.to/followWI
Spotify: https://FooFighters.lnk.to/followSI

Lyrics:
Nyah nyah nyah nyah
Your pretty face in a mirror
One hand to spin the lens
But it ain’t getting clearer
Dead gardens from bad seeds
But nice guys grow on trees
Big smile
Try not to choke on the glitter
 
Get back
Hear that, boy?
Someone threw away your favorite toy for good
For good 
 
Outside and out of mind
I’m coming down to the wire
Hold fast and hold my hand
And hold me over the fire
Can’t keep my glasses clean
Candy and dopamine
So sweet
It’s gonna give me the shivers
 
Get back
Hear that, boy? 
Someone threw away your favorite toy for good
For good
 
Is the pressure hard enough
If the treasure’s not enough?
Is the pressure hard enough
If the treasure’s not enough to know for good?
 
Get back
Hear that, boy?
Someone threw away your favorite toy

#FooFighters #YourFavoriteToy #GrahamNorton

Colour Producer: Ella Hill @ellahill.jpg

Lyrics:
Go put on your suit & tie
Make yourself look perfect
For our last goodbye 
Standing there with flowers 
As we rest in peace
You won't ever see me cry

All of the nights
All of the times
That I stood up for you 
All of the lies
Loving is blind 
I couldn't see the truth 
All the shit I did to pull us out the grave 
All the shit I did, you'd never do the same

Now we're standing in the kitchen 
With you begging me to listen 
But I've learnt your language well enough to read you 
So you switched up the positions
Played the victim, now you listen 
But my blood is cold so it's too late to redo

Go put on your suit & tie
Make yourself look perfect 
For our last goodbye 
Standing there with flowers 
As we rest in peace
You won't ever see me cry

Go put on your suit & tie
praying for forgiveness
Boy you out of time 
Standing there with flowers 
As we're buried deep
You'll be mourning me 
‘Til the end of time
For your whole damn life
Better go put on your suit & tie

You put on a show
Curtains are closed
Not a word you can say
Playing my heart 
Was only a part
Of all your twisted games
Faking all your tears like you're keeping score 
Were you faking all the years to win some dumb award 

Cuz now we're standing in the kitchen 
With you begging me to listen 
But I've learnt your language well enough to read you 
So you switched up the positions
Played the victim
Now you listen 
It's already over
I don't need closure
Found my composure

Go put on your suit & tie
Make yourself look perfect 
For our last goodbye 
Standing there with flowers 
As we rest in peace
You won't ever see me cry

Go put on your suit & tie
Praying for forgiveness, boy you out of time 
Standing there with flowers 
As we're buried deep
You'll be mourning me 
Till the end of time
For your whole damn life
Better go put on your suit & tie

Hey
All your pleading worked until I saw a change
And you drove the hearse that held my body’s cage
As you turned us to nothing
And dust fell on trusting
The sorry is late

Go put on your suit & tie
Make yourself look perfect 
For our last goodbye 
Standing there with flowers 
As we rest in peace
You won't ever see me cry

Go put on your suit & tie
Praying for forgiveness, boy you out of time 
Standing there with flowers 
As we're buried deep
You'll be mourning me 
Till the end of time
For your whole damn life
Better go put on your suit & tie

snippet.title: Simon & Garfunkel - The Sound Of Silence (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
❤️ Subscribe to Monstafluff Music: https://bit.ly/MonstafluffSubscribe
🕋 Download / Stream: https://open.spotify.com/album/07RAGILF28QweYQSZasr5k
👍  Song: Simon & Garfunkel - The Sound Of Silence (Lyrics)

⚫️Simon & Garfunkel 

🏮 Monstafluff Music:
https://open.spotify.com/user/monstafluffmusic 
https://facebook.com/monstafluffmusic
https://youtube.com/monstafluffmusic
https://twitter.com/Monstafluff

🎤 Lyrics: 
[Verse 1]
Hello, darkness, my old friend
I've come to talk with you again
Because a vision softly creeping
Left its seeds while I was sleeping
And the vision that was planted in my brain
Still remains
Within the sound of silence

[Verse 2]
In restless dreams, I walked alone
Narrow streets of cobblestone
'Neath the halo of a street lamp
I turned my collar to the cold and damp
When my eyes were stabbed by the flash of a neon light
That split the night
And touched the sound of silence

[Verse 3]
And in the naked light, I saw
Ten thousand people, maybe more
People talking without speaking
People hearing without listening
People writing songs that voices never shared
And no one dared
Disturb the sound of silence

[Verse 4]
"Fools," said I, "You do not know
Silence, like a cancer, grows
Hear my words that I might teach you
Take my arms that I might reach you"
But my words, like silent raindrops, fell
And echoed in the wells of silence

[Verse 5]
And the people bowed and prayed
To the neon god they made
And the sign flashed out its warning
In the words that it was forming
And the sign said, "The words of the prophets are written on the subway walls
And tenement halls
And whispered in the sound of silence"

🍁 Wallpaper: https://unsplash.com/
